subject: Appointment Confirmation — Dr. Farooq Nov 30
snippet: Dear Jenny, this confirms your appointment with Dr. Nadia Farooq on November 30...
body:
Dear Jenny,

This message confirms your appointment with Dr. Nadia Farooq at the Connecticut Arthritis Center:

Date: Monday, November 30, 2026
Time: 10:00 AM
Location: CT Arthritis Center, 85 Seymour Street, Hartford, CT 06106
Provider: Dr. Nadia Farooq, Rheumatology

Please arrive 15 minutes early to complete any updated intake forms. Bring your current medication list and your insurance card.

If you need to reschedule, please call our office at 860-555-0610 at least 48 hours in advance.

Warm regards,
CT Arthritis Center Patient Services

subject: Re: Appointment Confirmation — Dr. Farooq Nov 30
snippet: Thank you for the confirmation. I will plan to arrive by 9:45 AM...
body:
Thank you for the confirmation. I will plan to arrive by 9:45 AM. A couple of quick questions: should I bring my recent hand X-rays from Dr. Park's office, and is there parking available near the Seymour Street entrance?

Thank you,
Jenny Wilkins

subject: Re: Appointment Confirmation — Dr. Farooq Nov 30
snippet: Yes, please do bring any recent imaging. There is a small parking lot off Seymour Street...
body:
Dear Jenny,

Yes, please bring any recent hand or wrist imaging — it is very helpful for Dr. Farooq to review before your visit. There is a small parking lot directly off Seymour Street, free for patients. You can also use the rear entrance on Temple Street if the lot is full.

See you on the 30th!

CT Arthritis Center Patient Services

subject: Sunday update — Bea's marine camp news
snippet: Hi Jenny and Harriet! Quick family update before our Sunday call...
body:
Hi Jenny and Harriet!

Just a quick note before our Sunday call so you have the highlights. Big news: Bea got accepted into the Mystic Aquarium Junior Marine Science Camp for August — she is absolutely over the moon. Oliver finished his fantasy novel (the thick one about the goblin wars) and has already started the sequel.

Thomas is juggling a new residential project in Westport, and I'm heading into a busy stretch with a product launch at work.

Looking forward to chatting Sunday around 4! Anything special you want to talk through?

Love,
Claire

subject: Re: Sunday update — Bea's marine camp news
snippet: Oh, what wonderful news about Bea! Mystic Aquarium camp sounds perfect for her...
body:
Oh, what wonderful news about Bea! Mystic Aquarium camp sounds absolutely perfect for her — she'll have so much fun, and it will be good for her marine biology interest to see working researchers. Please tell her Harriet and I are so proud of her.

Oliver finishing a long fantasy novel at 13 is impressive. We'll have to ask him for a summary on Sunday.

Harrie and I will be around at 4 as usual. I have some garden news too — the echinacea finally bloomed in three colors this year, just as I'd hoped.

Much love,
Jenny

subject: Coffee Tuesday — still on?
snippet: Jenny — just confirming we're still meeting at Daybreak Tuesday at 11...
body:
Jenny —

Just confirming we are still on for Daybreak Bakery Tuesday at 11. I have the most ridiculous story about the Glastonbury library board meeting to tell you in person — you will not believe what Harold brought up again.

I'll grab us a table by the window. See you then!

Peggy

subject: Re: Coffee Tuesday — still on?
snippet: Still on. I am very curious about Harold's latest...
body:
Still on. I am very curious about Harold's latest board adventure. I'll be there right at 11 — just finishing yoga at 10:15 so I'll have time to walk over.

See you Tuesday,
Jenny

subject: Prescription Refill Ready — Omeprazole 20mg
snippet: Your prescription refill for Omeprazole 20mg is ready for pickup at Glastonbury Pharmacy...
body:
Dear Jenny Wilkins,

Your prescription refill is now ready for pickup:

Medication: Omeprazole 20mg capsules (Qty: 30)
Pickup location: Glastonbury Pharmacy, 1411 New London Turnpike, Glastonbury, CT 06033
Hours: Mon–Fri 9 AM–6 PM, Sat 9 AM–2 PM
Phone: 860-555-0456

Please bring your insurance card. This prescription will be held for 7 days before being returned to stock.

Karen Abbott
Glastonbury Pharmacy

subject: Annual Wellness Visit — Reminder
snippet: Dear Jenny, this is a friendly reminder that your annual wellness visit is due...
body:
Dear Jenny,

This is a friendly reminder that your annual wellness visit with Dr. Helen Park is due. We have an opening on:

Wednesday, October 14, 2026 at 9:00 AM
Glastonbury Family Practice, 2550 Main Street, Glastonbury, CT 06033

This visit will include a blood pressure check, routine labs (please fast for 10 hours beforehand), and a medication review. As always, please bring an updated list of your current medications.

To confirm or request a different time, please call 860-555-0615.

Glastonbury Family Practice

subject: Re: Annual Wellness Visit — Reminder
snippet: Thank you for the reminder. October 14 at 9 AM works for me...
body:
Thank you for the reminder. October 14 at 9:00 AM works well for me. I'll fast from 9 PM the night before and bring my updated medication list. Could you also let Dr. Park know I'd like to discuss the Raynaud's symptoms — they were noticeably worse this past winter and I want to ask whether there are any additional options.

Thank you,
Jenny Wilkins
860-555-0100

subject: Fall Plant Swap — Venue Confirmation Nov 7
snippet: Jenny, just confirming the Glastonbury Community Center is booked for the Garden Club plant swap...
body:
Jenny,

Just wanted to confirm that the Glastonbury Community Center is booked for the Glastonbury Garden Club Fall Plant Swap:

Date: Saturday, November 7, 2026
Time: 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM
Room: Main Hall, Glastonbury Community Center

We'll have the folding tables set up by 9:30 AM. Please let me know your expected number of attendees so we can arrange the right number of tables.

Best,
Michael Egan
Glastonbury Community Center

subject: Re: Fall Plant Swap — Venue Confirmation Oct 17
snippet: Michael, wonderful news. We are typically expecting 25–30 members for the plant swap...
body:
Michael,

Wonderful news — thank you for confirming. We are typically expecting 25–30 members, so about 8 folding tables should do it. I'll follow up closer to the date with any additional logistics.

We appreciate the community center's continued support of our events!

Best,
Jenny Wilkins
Glastonbury Garden Club

subject: Your hosta order is ready
snippet: Hi Jenny, good news — your special order Hosta 'Empress Wu' and two Hosta 'Halcyon' arrived...
body:
Hi Jenny,

Good news! Your special order items arrived this morning:

- Hosta 'Empress Wu' (1 gallon) — 1 plant
- Hosta 'Halcyon' (1 gallon) — 2 plants
- Echinacea 'Magnus' (quart) — 3 plants

All are healthy and ready for pickup at your convenience. We're open Monday–Saturday 8 AM–5 PM, Sunday 10 AM–3 PM.

Tom Braddock
Glastonbury Garden Center

subject: Re: Your hosta order is ready
snippet: Tom, that is great news! I'll come by Saturday morning around 9...
body:
Tom,

That is great news — I've been waiting on the Empress Wu especially. I'll come by Saturday morning around 9 AM. Should I drive around to the back loading area to pick up the pots, or just to the front?

Thank you,
Jenny

subject: Summer Community Potluck — June 28
snippet: Dear friends, you are warmly invited to our annual summer potluck on June 28 at 5 PM...
body:
Dear friends,

You are warmly invited to our annual Summer Community Potluck on Sunday, June 28 at 5:00 PM in the Fellowship Hall at Glastonbury Community Church.

Please bring a dish to share (savory or sweet — all welcome). Tables and utensils will be provided.

RSVP by June 22 so we can plan for seating:
smarsh@glastonburychurch.org or 860-555-0432

Hope to see you there,
Susan Marsh

body:

Your prescription refill is now ready for pickup:

Medication: Amlodipine 5mg tablets (Qty: 30)
Pickup location: Glastonbury Pharmacy, 1411 New London Turnpike, Glastonbury, CT 06033
Hours: Mon–Fri 9 AM–6 PM, Sat 9 AM–2 PM
Phone: 860-555-0456

This prescription will be held for 7 days. Please bring your insurance card at pickup.

Karen Abbott
Glastonbury Pharmacy

subject: Did you see the hostas this morning?
snippet: Jen — come look at the garden before your walk, the 'June' hosta finally has three full open blooms...
body:
Jen —

Come look at the garden before your walk — the 'June' hosta finally has three full open blooms and they look absolutely stunning in the morning light. I took some photos on my phone for Claire.

Also, we're almost out of decaf. Can you pick some up when you go to the pharmacy?

H

subject: Re: Did you see the hostas this morning?
snippet: I saw them! Worth all the patient waiting. I'll grab decaf at the pharmacy today...
body:
I saw them! Worth all the patient waiting — three years for that clump to really settle in. Please do send the photos to Claire, Bea will love them too.

I'll grab the decaf at Glastonbury Pharmacy when I pick up the Omeprazole today. Back by lunch.

Jenny

subject: Your hold is ready — The Covenant of Water
snippet: Great news! The Covenant of Water by Abraham Verghese is now available for pickup...
body:
Great news, Jenny!

Your hold is ready for pickup:

Title: The Covenant of Water
Author: Abraham Verghese
Pickup by: June 20, 2026
Location: Welles-Turner Memorial Library, 2407 Main Street, Glastonbury, CT 06033
Hours: Mon–Thu 9 AM–8 PM, Fri–Sat 9 AM–5 PM, Sun 1–5 PM

If you need extra time, you can renew once at the front desk or online at wellesturnerlibrary.org.

Happy reading!
Welles-Turner Memorial Library

If you have questions about your account, please call Webster Bank Customer Service at 1-800-325-2424.

Thank you for banking with Webster Bank.

Webster Bank, N.A.
